title: Lagynias dryadum

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Lagynias dryadum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Lagynias dryadum is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies such as teas, tonics, and syrups.
